ground_truth_provenance.details: Dataset range/object labels are used, but RD Doppler boxes are proxy-derived from clean RD peak projection inside the labeled range interval. This is explicitly labeled as supplementary/proxy; no model outputs are used as GT.

weak_threshold_leakage.details: Weak/mid/strong thresholds are computed from train-frame clean_peak values only; leakage flags are false.

fixed_pfa_protocol.details: Calibration thresholds use validation background cells; test PFA uses test background cells.

baseline_and_constraints.details: Main baseline is balanced_mild; weak_weight=2.0, lambda_rec=0.5; no D6, false-alarm penalty, full loss, larger model, detector modification, or RA mainline.

score_normalization.details: No metric division by model-output max/min was found. Raw PFA/FA/hit/Pd values are saved.

result_existence_consistency.details: Required CSV/JSON/MD files and six figures exist; reported numbers match CSV/JSON to rounding.

scope_claim_strength.details: Scope is 2 seeds, 96/96/96 frames, RD-only, medium-SIR, synthetic interference, and proxy RD boxes. Claims must remain limited.

claims.claim: D5D ran an end-to-end RD-only fixed-PFA supplementary sanity experiment.
RD weak weighting improves weak-target preservation.

action_items: Keep D5D claims limited to RD-only supplementary proxy sanity.
Do not enter D6 from these results.
Require true Doppler/velocity GT or a stronger pre-registered RD localization protocol before real RD-performance claims.
